description: Pins the connection-type vocabulary token filter (#413) across cli/schist/commands.py _connection_types and mcp-server loadVaultConfig. An entry serializes into `- {type}: target` connection lines, so it must satisfy the same single-token rule as a target: non-empty and free of every SLUG_WS_CHARS codepoint (CONNECTION_RE's token groups are each one non-whitespace run). Entries are the POST-COERCION strings (after str()/String()); `kept` says whether the entry survives into the effective vocabulary. Non-ASCII test codepoints are stored as uXXXX escapes on purpose (ensure_ascii JSON) - keep it that way. Consumed by cli/tests/test_commands.py and mcp-server/tests/tools.test.ts.

entries.name: colon inside a token round-trips via regex backtracking
leading bracket is valid for a TYPE (ingest's bracket skip applies to targets only)
empty string (dropped silently - getStringList filter(Boolean) parity)
NBSP (whitespace but not a line boundary)
newline (line boundary - would split the serialized line)
NEL U+0085 (Python-side of the whitespace union)
ZWNBSP/BOM U+FEFF (JS-side of the whitespace union)
